title: allium schoenoprasum subsp. sibiricum
intro: Allium schoenoprasum subsp. sibiricum, also known as Siberian chives, is a subspecies of the Allium schoenoprasum plant, belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is native to Siberia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Siberian chives include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Siberian chives can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
